Soy 2025-11-25 5:01 PM

NOSFERATUS LAST BUGS

  • Nosferatus’ visual QTE (the white background behind the letter) isn’t showing up on Controller, which makes the letter almost impossible to read.
-# i saw this with my own eyes, its true console bug
  • B button doesnt work on Bloodhooks QTE because of shiftlock overriding it (i think).
console bug
  • During Ascension, the jump button (X on controller) isn’t working, so you can’t fly and you just stay on the ground.
console bug
5:03 PM

Lyth 2025-11-26 6:14 PM

6:14 PM
Add a minigame progress indicator (tug-of-war meter or simple 0–100% bar)
6:14 PM
here
6:14 PM
# NOSFERATUS BALANCING * **Lacerate (M1)** * Damage increased from **20 → 24** * **Blood Hook** * Projectile speed increased by **10%** * Now harder for survivors to escape (Increase the number of required inputs, the sequence is too short right now) * Total damage increased from **12/18 → 15/20** (35 total). Close-range damage unchanged * Now passes through all buildings instead of stopping on impact (like Void Rush), still dealing **15** initial damage to structures * Nosferatu becomes completely immovable and unhittable while pulling * Landing the second hit grants **1.5s** of lingering immunity * Failing to land the second hit now inflicts **1s of helpless** on Nosferatu * Add a minigame progress indicator (tug-of-war meter or simple 0–100% bar) * **Cataclysm** * Puddle size slightly increased (~10%) * No longer pauses stamina regeneration * Nosferatu can now pass through all players while active * **Ascension** * Dive windup increased from **0.6s → 0.7s** * Dive turning control reduced by **33%** * Duration increased from **7s → 10s** * Added duration indicator * Cooldown decreased from **35s → 30s** * Exit/Miss slowness + helplessness reduced from **3s → 2.5s** * **Hunter’s Feast** * Damage increased from **5 → 10** * Fixed Weakness not applying properly * Add an indicator showing when Hunter’s Feast can be redirected when the ability is pressed again
6:14 PM

Soy 2025-11-29 1:01 PM

QoL Visuals

  • Add a progress meter to the Bloodhook QTE on the survivor’s side, either a bar or a percentage (1–100%) so they aren’t forced to guess how long it will last. ## Descriptions
  • https://discord.com/channels/1429975206595657730/1429975207912935494/1444379141897191445 # Stats
-----------------

bloodhook:

  • Bloodhook now has two different cooldowns depending on whether you hit or miss:
    • on hit: Cooldown becomes: 30s
    • on miss: Cooldown becomes: 20s
  • Cataclysm
    • Cooldown: 20 -> 25
    • Bleeding reduced: Bleeding III → Bleeding II
    • Puddle lifetime: ~12s → 10s
    • Survivors who step in a puddle are highlighted for 5s
-# i think the puddles life time is 12s, not sure tho
  • Ascencion:
    • Cooldown: 30 -> 35
    • The Ascension bat-lunge sound cue is now louder
    # "Bugs"
  • Nosferatus does not have XP and Cash events for hitting abilities FIXED ALREADY
 (edited)

1:02 PM

QoL Visuals

  • Add a progress meter to the Bloodhook QTE on the survivor’s side, either a bar or a percentage (1–100%) so they aren’t forced to guess how long it will last. ## Descriptions
  • https://discord.com/channels/1429975206595657730/1429975207912935494/1444379141897191445 # Stats
-----------------

bloodhook:

  • Bloodhook now has two different cooldowns depending on whether you hit or miss:
    • on hit: Cooldown becomes: 30s
    • on miss: Cooldown becomes: 20s
  • Cataclysm
    • Cooldown: 20 -> 25
    • Bleeding reduced: Bleeding III → Bleeding II
    • Puddle lifetime: ~12s → 10s
    • Survivors who step in a puddle are highlighted for 5s
-# i think the puddles life time is 12s, not sure tho
  • Ascencion:
    • Cooldown: 30 -> 35
    • The Ascension bat-lunge sound cue is now louder
    # "Bugs"
  • Nosferatus does not have XP and Cash events for hitting abilities FIXED ALREADY
 (edited)

Descriptions

  • https://discord.com/channels/1429975206595657730/1429975207912935494/1444379141897191445 # Stats
-----------------

bloodhook:

  • Bloodhook now has two different cooldowns depending on whether you hit or miss:
    • on hit: Cooldown becomes: 30s
    • on miss: Cooldown becomes: 20s

Cataclysm

  • Cooldown: 20 -> 25
  • Bleeding reduced: Bleeding III → Bleeding II
  • Puddle lifetime: ~14s → 12s
  • Survivors who step in a puddle are highlighted for 5s

Ascencion:

  • Cooldown: 30 -> 35
  • Ascension Bat Dive second-hit damage reduced from 35 → 30 (total damage now 35)
  • The Ascension bat-lunge sound cue is now louder

"Bugs"

  • Nosferatus does not have XP and Cash events for hitting abilities
  • Fixed Nosferatus being able to spam inputs during the QTE to guarantee winning the minigame.
 (edited)

Update 3.4.1

Nosferatu:

bloodhook:

  • Bloodhook now has two different cooldowns depending on whether you hit or miss:
    • on hit: Cooldown becomes: 30s
    • on miss: Cooldown becomes: 20s

Cataclysm

  • Cooldown: 20 -> 25
  • Bleeding reduced: Bleeding III → Bleeding II
  • Puddle lifetime: ~14s → 12s
  • Survivors who step in a puddle are highlighted for 5s

Ascencion:

  • Cooldown: 30 -> 35
  • Ascension Bat Dive second-hit damage reduced from 35 → 30 (total damage now 35)
  • The Ascension bat-lunge sound cue is now louder

"Bugs"

  • Nosferatus does not have XP and Cash events for hitting abilities
  • Fixed Nosferatus being able to spam inputs during the QTE to guarantee winning the minigame.
  • Fixed Descriptions for
    • Noli
    • Guest666
    • Veeronica
    • Dusekkar
    • Elliot
    • Chance
 (edited)
Soy

Update 3.4.1

Nosferatu:

bloodhook:

  • Bloodhook now has two different cooldowns depending on whether you hit or miss:
    • on hit: Cooldown becomes: 30s
    • on miss: Cooldown becomes: 20s

Cataclysm

  • Cooldown: 20 -> 25
  • Bleeding reduced: Bleeding III → Bleeding II
  • Puddle lifetime: ~14s → 12s
  • Survivors who step in a puddle are highlighted for 5s

Ascencion:

  • Cooldown: 30 -> 35
  • Ascension Bat Dive second-hit damage reduced from 35 → 30 (total damage now 35)
  • The Ascension bat-lunge sound cue is now louder

"Bugs"

  • Nosferatus does not have XP and Cash events for hitting abilities
  • Fixed Nosferatus being able to spam inputs during the QTE to guarantee winning the minigame.
  • Fixed Descriptions for
    • Noli
    • Guest666
    • Veeronica
    • Dusekkar
    • Elliot
    • Chance

Soy 2025-12-11 8:07 PM

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead. (outright remove the range requirement so it works)
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE
  • Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • SIXER
  • Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are increased by 25% so the passive has no effect on them.)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit (doesn’t do anything to begin with)
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Investigate Reroll not functioning properly: https://medal.tv/games/roblox/clips/lF2QbMpLUXTD0PK37?invite=cr-MSxac1EsMjMzMDk1OTQ5&v=7
(The lowest health Chance can gamble is 60. With 3 stacks, he should gain an extra 10% HP (this being 6HP) based on the stacks. For example, in the clip, he had 69 HP and rerolled with 3 stacks — even if he gambled 60 HP, he should have ended up with 66 HP due to the stacks, but instead he only got 61.)
  • TwoTime
  • Sacrificial Dagger base stab windup increased: 0.1s → 0.3s.
*This is a temporary nerf *
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through tap traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.
-# already in (edited)
Soy

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead. (outright remove the range requirement so it works)
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE
  • Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • SIXER
  • Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are increased by 25% so the passive has no effect on them.)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit (doesn’t do anything to begin with)
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Investigate Reroll not functioning properly: https://medal.tv/games/roblox/clips/lF2QbMpLUXTD0PK37?invite=cr-MSxac1EsMjMzMDk1OTQ5&v=7
(The lowest health Chance can gamble is 60. With 3 stacks, he should gain an extra 10% HP (this being 6HP) based on the stacks. For example, in the clip, he had 69 HP and rerolled with 3 stacks — even if he gambled 60 HP, he should have ended up with 66 HP due to the stacks, but instead he only got 61.)
  • TwoTime
  • Sacrificial Dagger base stab windup increased: 0.1s → 0.3s.
*This is a temporary nerf *
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through tap traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.

Soy 2025-12-11 8:14 PM
Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts. Wouldn’t it make more sense to have it track whatever movement keys you’re using on your keyboard, instead of being preset to WASD, and make those your input keys for the minigame?
Soy
Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts. Wouldn’t it make more sense to have it track whatever movement keys you’re using on your keyboard, instead of being preset to WASD, and make those your input keys for the minigame?
voxov 2025-12-11 8:16 PM

voxov
yeah but i am unsure how we can track that i assume its possible??
Lyth 2025-12-11 8:17 PM
UIS:GetStringForKeyCode(Enum.KeyCode.W)
8:17 PM

8:17 PM
on azerty that returns Z and so on
Lyth
UIS:GetStringForKeyCode(Enum.KeyCode.W)
voxov 2025-12-11 8:18 PM
ah okaoka then yeah should be good
Soy

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead. (outright remove the range requirement so it works)
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE
  • Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • SIXER
  • Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are increased by 25% so the passive has no effect on them.)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit (doesn’t do anything to begin with)
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Investigate Reroll not functioning properly: https://medal.tv/games/roblox/clips/lF2QbMpLUXTD0PK37?invite=cr-MSxac1EsMjMzMDk1OTQ5&v=7
(The lowest health Chance can gamble is 60. With 3 stacks, he should gain an extra 10% HP (this being 6HP) based on the stacks. For example, in the clip, he had 69 HP and rerolled with 3 stacks — even if he gambled 60 HP, he should have ended up with 66 HP due to the stacks, but instead he only got 61.)
  • TwoTime
  • Sacrificial Dagger base stab windup increased: 0.1s → 0.3s.
*This is a temporary nerf *
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through tap traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead. (outright remove the range requirement so it works)
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE

  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.

  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.

  • SIXER
  • Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are increased by 25% so the passive has no effect on them.)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit (doesn’t do anything to begin with)
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Investigate Reroll not functioning properly: https://medal.tv/games/roblox/clips/lF2QbMpLUXTD0PK37?invite=cr-MSxac1EsMjMzMDk1OTQ5&v=7
(The lowest health Chance can gamble is 60. With 3 stacks, he should gain an extra 10% HP (this being 6HP) based on the stacks. *This is a temporary nerf *
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through tap traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.

  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE

  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead. (outright remove the range requirement so it works)
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE
  • Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • SIXER
  • Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are increased by 25% so the passive has no effect on them.)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit (doesn’t do anything to begin with)
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Investigate Reroll not functioning properly: https://medal.tv/games/roblox/clips/lF2QbMpLUXTD0PK37?invite=cr-MSxac1EsMjMzMDk1OTQ5&v=7
(The lowest health Chance can gamble is 60. With 3 stacks, he should gain an extra 10% HP (this being 6HP) based on the stacks. For example, in the clip, he had 69 HP and rerolled with 3 stacks — even if he gambled 60 HP, he should have ended up with 66 HP due to the stacks, but instead he only got 61.)
  • TwoTime
  • Sacrificial Dagger base stab windup increased: 0.1s → 0.3s.
*This is a temporary nerf *
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through tap traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.

@voxov @Lyth (idk if i should ping nova) any of you that can help me with this? This should be the final balance log/list for this update. I can handle some of the simpler things, but there are a few I genuinely need help cause im not the best programmer....
semaj 2025-12-16 2:36 AM

2:37 AM

2:37 AM
it’s already insanely loopable
Soy

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead. (outright remove the range requirement so it works)
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE
  • Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • SIXER
  • Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are increased by 25% so the passive has no effect on them.)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit (doesn’t do anything to begin with)
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Investigate Reroll not functioning properly: https://medal.tv/games/roblox/clips/lF2QbMpLUXTD0PK37?invite=cr-MSxac1EsMjMzMDk1OTQ5&v=7
(The lowest health Chance can gamble is 60. With 3 stacks, he should gain an extra 10% HP (this being 6HP) based on the stacks. For example, in the clip, he had 69 HP and rerolled with 3 stacks — even if he gambled 60 HP, he should have ended up with 66 HP due to the stacks, but instead he only got 61.)
  • TwoTime
  • Sacrificial Dagger base stab windup increased: 0.1s → 0.3s.
*This is a temporary nerf *
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through tap traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.
-# already in (edited)

  • WSO now passes through tap traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).

voxov 2025-12-23 7:26 PM
whats the general consensus (edited)
voxov
whats the general consensus (edited)
Soy 2025-12-23 7:31 PM
@voxov @Marill Jockey @Lyth Overall, the testing session went fairly well. Jane Doe didn’t feel bad to play or play against, but she also didn’t feel overpowered. From both my perspective and other testers’, she felt mostly “right”, somewhere in the middle. She leaned slightly on the stronger side, but not to the point where it felt frustrating or unfair. It was the kind of strength you could tolerate without it becoming oppressive. In terms of balance, matches usually had one Jane Doe, sometimes two, and at most three, which felt reasonable. Playing against her didn’t feel nearly as bad as things like taph stacking or two time stacking, which tend to be miserable. I think a big reason for this is that this was her first testing session, so players were still learning her. Many people played her in very obvious or inefficient ways, which is actually useful feedback because it shows how casual and non-competitive players will realistically approach her kit The main issue I noticed isn’t balance, but identity. She isn’t boring, but she does feel like a “better Shedletski” in some ways. I don’t necessarily mind that, but I’d rather avoid making her feel like just another character that replaces an existing one instead of bringing something new. Right now, her role is very focused: supporting Sentinels or surviving on her own using crystal shards to apply resonance and stun the killer. That playstyle works, and it feels fine mechanically, but it’s also very straightforward I also noticed that some testers weren’t a big fan of her being locked into a Sentinel-only support role, even though I personally don’t mind it. Because of that, I started thinking about how we could give her more variety and flexibility without breaking her identity. My idea is to turn her into a more general support character, not just for Sentinels, while still keeping her crystal-based gameplay intact. The concept is to give Jane Doe two different types of crystal shards, similar to how Veronica has multiple skating modes. One shard would be the current version, designed to hit the killer only, ignore survivors, and apply resonance as it already does. The second shard would be a survivor-focused version that ignores the killer and only targets survivors. When Jane Doe hits a survivor with the survivor shard, that survivor gains a single stack of resonance (capped at one). While that resonance is active, any positive status effects applied to that survivor by supports, such as speed, resistance, strength, etc. would be boosted by a small amount (around 20% (also survivor gets highlighted to all supports for 5 seconds). Once those boosted effects are applied, the resonance stack is consumed and removed. This mirrors how resonance works as a stun on killers: hitting the killer extends or enables a stun, while hitting a survivor enhances support effects instead. This would allow Jane Doe to synergize with all support characters, not just Sentinels, and give her multiple viable playstyles: killer disruption, team support, or hybrid play. The goal is to make her more engaging and flexible without making her oppressive, and to give her a clearer, more unique identity that feels fun both short-term and long-term. (edited)
7:31 PM
--------------------------------------------------------- ima ping @Vess aswell cause why not (edited)
7:36 PM
  • Lower the resonance status effect duration from 40s to 27s for testing purposes.
    • (Specifically, this change applies to the first hit of Crystal Pitch.)
Soy
@voxov @Marill Jockey @Lyth Overall, the testing session went fairly well. Jane Doe didn’t feel bad to play or play against, but she also didn’t feel overpowered. From both my perspective and other testers’, she felt mostly “right”, somewhere in the middle. She leaned slightly on the stronger side, but not to the point where it felt frustrating or unfair. It was the kind of strength you could tolerate without it becoming oppressive. In terms of balance, matches usually had one Jane Doe, sometimes two, and at most three, which felt reasonable. Playing against her didn’t feel nearly as bad as things like taph stacking or two time stacking, which tend to be miserable. I think a big reason for this is that this was her first testing session, so players were still learning her. Many people played her in very obvious or inefficient ways, which is actually useful feedback because it shows how casual and non-competitive players will realistically approach her kit The main issue I noticed isn’t balance, but identity. She isn’t boring, but she does feel like a “better Shedletski” in some ways. I don’t necessarily mind that, but I’d rather avoid making her feel like just another character that replaces an existing one instead of bringing something new. Right now, her role is very focused: supporting Sentinels or surviving on her own using crystal shards to apply resonance and stun the killer. That playstyle works, and it feels fine mechanically, but it’s also very straightforward I also noticed that some testers weren’t a big fan of her being locked into a Sentinel-only support role, even though I personally don’t mind it. Because of that, I started thinking about how we could give her more variety and flexibility without breaking her identity. My idea is to turn her into a more general support character, not just for Sentinels, while still keeping her crystal-based gameplay intact. The concept is to give Jane Doe two different types of crystal shards, similar to how Veronica has multiple skating modes. One shard would be the current version, designed to hit the killer only, ignore survivors, and apply resonance as it already does. The second shard would be a survivor-focused version that ignores the killer and only targets survivors. When Jane Doe hits a survivor with the survivor shard, that survivor gains a single stack of resonance (capped at one). While that resonance is active, any positive status effects applied to that survivor by supports, such as speed, resistance, strength, etc. would be boosted by a small amount (around 20% (also survivor gets highlighted to all supports for 5 seconds). Once those boosted effects are applied, the resonance stack is consumed and removed. This mirrors how resonance works as a stun on killers: hitting the killer extends or enables a stun, while hitting a survivor enhances support effects instead. This would allow Jane Doe to synergize with all support characters, not just Sentinels, and give her multiple viable playstyles: killer disruption, team support, or hybrid play. The goal is to make her more engaging and flexible without making her oppressive, and to give her a clearer, more unique identity that feels fun both short-term and long-term. (edited)

Soy 2025-12-24 4:57 PM

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead.
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE
  • Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • SIXER
  • Updated Description
  • New Passive: Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are not affected by the new Passive)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Extra %health on reroll now works properly if you reroll with 2 or 3 stacks
  • TwoTime
  • Sacrificial Dagger base stab windup increased: 0.1s → 0.3s.
  • removed frontstab stacking nerfs
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through taph traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.
 (edited)

alyssa 2025-12-24 9:57 PM
  • Executioner Slasher's Gashing Wound doesn't work
Soy

Update balance list

  • Misc.
  • Bloxy Cola speed is now reduced to Speed 1 when used in LMS.
  • If you get hit with slowness while under Bloxy Cola effects, the speed is canceled entirely (but the player does not gain slowness).
  • Drinking Bloxy Cola is canceled if the player takes damage.
  • TAPH
  • Tripwire Killer aura reveal no longer has a 100-stud range requirement, working even if the Taph is dead.
  • Fixed Taph’s Friendly building highlight not showing beyond 100 studs.
  • Taph stacking penalties increased: 0.3 / 0.35 → 0.5.
  • Tripwire now has unlimited lifetime.
  • 007N7
  • Clone now allows using Inject and c00lgui 3 seconds after casting (lets you use abilities faster, previously, after cloning, 7N7 couldn’t teleport for 6 - 7 seconds).
  • Inject now features unique icons for each AI mode, with the current mode displayed above the icon, similar to Veeronica’s Broadcast.
  • JOHN DOE
  • Digital Footprint cooldown reduced: 8s → 3s.
  • John Doe can now see his own Digital Footprints.
  • Digital Footprints now have infinite lifetime.
  • 404 Error reveal duration increased: 4s → 6s.
  • Unstoppable base duration increased: 2.5s → 3s.
  • Added a trap stack counter above Digital Footprint ability icon: shows how many traps are placed; counter turns red at max (3), indicating that placing a new trap will replace the first.
  • SIXER
  • Updated Description
  • New Passive: Passively reduces duration of negative status effects (including stuns) by 25%.
  • Walk speed increased: 8.75 → 9.
(Self-inflicted negative status effects are not affected by the new Passive)
  • Nosferatu
  • Blood Hook now works correctly on non-QWERTY keyboard layouts.
  • Blood Hook now has a visual showing which player is winning the tug-of-war.
  • Ascension no longer drains 25% stamina on exit
  • Cataclysm puddles are slightly raised to appear properly over paths and roads.
  • Chance
  • Extra %health on reroll now works properly if you reroll with 2 or 3 stacks
  • TwoTime
  • Sacrificial Dagger base stab windup increased: 0.1s → 0.3s.
  • removed frontstab stacking nerfs
  • C00lKiD
  • WSO now passes through taph traps instead of stopping after hitting one (similar to how Void Rush goes through them).
  • Slasher
  • Ability descriptions updated.
 (edited)

2:14 PM

2:16 PM

2:17 PM

2:17 PM

Soy 2025-12-25 2:25 PM

bugs

  • Elf Taph Subspace Tripmine does not work at all and plays a global sound for some reason
  • John Doe Digital Footprint Highlight's should be polished up so they aren't completely opaque (outline would be preferable I think)
  • Plead plays for John Doe for some reason ?
  • TwoTime stab windup nerf needs to be reimplemented
  • Private Servers will still send new players to the new player public servers
  • 007n7 Clone Highlight does not work
  • Some players have reported Burnt Guest and Classic Jack Frost not being given
  • Sometimes at the start of a match players are completely unable to sprint (apparently caused by lag)
  • Make entanglement give the Stunned status effect instead of the slowness one, the new Bloxy cola nerfs outright make entanglement do nothing, this should help the move stun u in place and still let u move normally when then mini game is finished
  • Monitoring TwoTime is still teleporting you to the wrong spot when you respawn
  • CK Minions still make no sound (just fully revert the sound effects if you can please)
  • Superstar emote plays placeholder music
  • C00lKiD can go through 7n7 Clones
 (edited)

CEO of Isaac 2025-12-26 9:05 AM
Bug Report: Persistent Sprint / Stamina Desync After Map Loading (Mobile) Platform: Roblox Mobile (Android) Device Type: Low-end Android phone Frequency: 100% reproducible (every round) FPS: Stable 30–50 Ping: 100–200 ms Description When a round starts, the map takes a long time to load on mobile. After loading finishes, sprinting does not work at all. Stamina drains normally, but the character stays stuck at walking speed for the entire round. This issue was rare before the Guest 666 update, but became common and now happens every round after that update, even after rejoining. Steps to Reproduce Join Forsaken on mobile. Start any round. Let the map load slowly. Attempt to sprint. Actual Result Stamina drains Sprint never activates Character stays at walking speed FPS and ping remain stable Rejoining does not fix it Expected Result Sprint should work normally once stamina is consumed and the map finishes loading. Troubleshooting Tried (No Fix) Factory reset phone Reinstall Roblox Reset Wi-Fi (WPS) Lowest graphics Closed background apps Network Clarification Ping is 100–200 ms Other players with higher ping do not experience this bug I am 13 years old and cannot change or buy new Wi-Fi Possible Cause Likely a mobile sprint state desync caused by sprint/stamina logic initializing before map loading completes, possibly introduced in the Guest 666 update. Suggested Fix Reinitialize sprint after map load Disable stamina drain until sprint state is confirmed Delay player controls until map loading finishes
9:05 AM
@voxov I was sent this if u wanna take a look @Marill Jockey

Soy 2025-12-26 10:37 PM
Ability Concept – Entanglement / Recall
  • 1x throws his swords simultaneously, similar to how Entanglement works. The swords travel forward and get lodged into whatever surface they hit, such as walls or map geometry.
  • If the swords hit a survivor during the throw:
    • The swords pass through the survivor(s), dealing damage and inflicting slowness
    • 1x gains a short speed boost equal to the duration of the slowness inflicted on the survivor(s)
  • While this ability is active and the swords are not in his hands, 1x’s kit changes:
  • His M1 is replaced with a weaker, short-range melee attack using his fists
  • All other abilities are temporarily locked
  • His walk speed and run speed are increased, as he’s no longer carrying the weight of the swords
At any point, 1x can recast the ability to recall the swords back to his hands, similar to Thor summoning his hammer. During the recall, the swords travel back toward 1x and deal damage to any survivor caught in their path.
  • When the swords return, a small explosion occurs:
  • Around 1x, and
  • At the location where a sword was embedded (explosion happens the moment they start traveling to 1x, not when it reaches his hands)
  • Any survivor caught within the explosion radius, either near 1x or near the embedded swords, is inflicted with poison, and their aura is revealed to 1x.
  • During the recall, 1x can move freely with no movement penalties until the swords return. Once the swords are back in his hands, his movement speed returns to normal (optionally with a brief slowness punishment), his standard M1 is restored, and all other abilities become usable again.
 (edited)
10:37 PM
@Eno XD
Eno XD 2025-12-26 10:38 PM

10:38 PM

10:38 PM

10:39 PM

  • While this ability is active and the swords are not in his hands, 1x’s kit changes:

  • All other abilities are temporarily locked
  • His walk speed and run speed are increased, as he’s no longer carrying the weight of the swords
At any point, 1x can recast the ability to recall the swords back to his hands, similar to Thor summoning his hammer. During the recall, the swords travel back toward 1x and deal damage to any survivor caught in their path.
  • When the swords return, a small explosion occurs:

Soy 2025-12-26 10:46 PM
Either have the swords pass through survivors, dealing damage and inflicting slowness (and 1x gets a short speed boost), or create a more unique interaction where the swords lodge into the survivor’s front or back. In that case, when 1x lands a punch M1, a custom animation plays where he rips the sword out and throws the survivor away, ragdolling them and doing more damage (second one might take a lot of effort both visually and mechanically and might also be really unfair or strong in gameplay) (edited)

Eno XD 2025-12-28 12:07 PM
(M1) - M1 (AB1) Mass Infection - Hold the ability key for a charge bar with 3 bars to appear If one bar is filled, shoot 3 shots one at a time in quick succession, small with low damage If two bars are filled, Shoot 2 shots one at a time on a second long beat, medium sized with moderate damage If all bars are filled, same as current mass infection, if not slightly bigger (AB2) Eye of the Storm - Using the move, spin into a tornado for a second before propelling it forward pulling survivors towards it, if a survivor is caught in the tornado, it will fly halfway back to 1x1 before exploding into a gust of wind, the tornado will bounce off walls 4 times until exploding into a gust of wind on its own (AB3) Dimension Fracture - Using the move, control a target on the floor with your mouse, after a timer is finished, a tesseract meteor will fall on that spot with a lingering red flame that gives burning and glitched when running into it, if the meteor lands on a survivor it will deal damage and ragdoll knockback (AB4) Unstable Eye - Unstable Eye (edited)
12:07 PM
my final 1x1 moveset
Eno XD
(M1) - M1 (AB1) Mass Infection - Hold the ability key for a charge bar with 3 bars to appear If one bar is filled, shoot 3 shots one at a time in quick succession, small with low damage If two bars are filled, Shoot 2 shots one at a time on a second long beat, medium sized with moderate damage If all bars are filled, same as current mass infection, if not slightly bigger (AB2) Eye of the Storm - Using the move, spin into a tornado for a second before propelling it forward pulling survivors towards it, if a survivor is caught in the tornado, it will fly halfway back to 1x1 before exploding into a gust of wind, the tornado will bounce off walls 4 times until exploding into a gust of wind on its own (AB3) Dimension Fracture - Using the move, control a target on the floor with your mouse, after a timer is finished, a tesseract meteor will fall on that spot with a lingering red flame that gives burning and glitched when running into it, if the meteor lands on a survivor it will deal damage and ragdoll knockback (AB4) Unstable Eye - Unstable Eye (edited)
